# ThemeKit component reference

205 public SwiftUI components. Every one reads `@Environment(\.theme)` and resolves all colors from tokens ‚Äî **never hardcode a color**. Init shows the *required/common* params; long-tail styling is set with the chainable modifiers listed at the bottom.

## Atoms (49)

- `AnimatedImage(url)` ‚Äî Animated GIF / APNG playback with NO third-party dependency ‚Äî frames and per-frame delays are decoded natively via ImageIO (`CGImageSource`) and driven by a `TimelineView(.animation)`. ¬∑ modifiers: `.contentMode()`, `.cornerRadius()`
- `Aura` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.accent()`, `.color()`, `.size()`, `.intensity()`
- `Avatar(content)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.dimension()`, `.accent()`, `.fill()`, `.fillColor()`, `.shape()`, `.presence()`, `.maxVisible()`
- `AvatarGroup` ‚Äî Overlapping stack of avatars with a "+N" overflow bubble.
- `Badge(text, action:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference BadgeView. ¬∑ modifiers: `.badgeStyle()`, `.variant()`, `.size()`, `.icon()`, `.badgeShape()`, `.trailingIcon()`, `.badgeColor()`, `.gradient()`, `.highlighted()`
- `Barcode(value)` ‚Äî A token-sized (but high-contrast) Code 128 barcode with an optional caption. ¬∑ modifiers: `.height()`, `.showsValue()`
- `Chip(title, isSelected:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference BasicChip ‚Äî a single clear selection API (tonal / solid) instead of the reference's nested status √ó mode √ó fullSelect √ó isExist matrix. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.chipStyle()`, `.icon()`, `.rating()`, `.exists()`, `.interactive()`, `.fullWidth()`, `.expands()`
- `CloseButton(action:)` ‚Äî A circular icon-only dismiss button. ¬∑ modifiers: `.tint()`, `.systemImage()`, `.plain()`, `.a11yID()`
- `CodeBlock(text, prefix:, highlight:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.copyable()`
- `Confetti` ‚Äî A token-bound confetti burst. ¬∑ modifiers: `.pieceCount()`, `.colors()`, `.duration()`
- `Ribbon(text, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî A corner ribbon wrapping any content (Ant `Badge.Ribbon`). ¬∑ modifiers: `.accent()`, `.color()`
- `CountdownTimer(until:)` ‚Äî A token-bound live countdown to `deadline`. ¬∑ modifiers: `.style()`, `.format()`, `.size()`, `.showsDays()`, `.urgentBelow()`, `.onFinish()`
- `DividerView(title)` ‚Äî A theme-driven divider: horizontal / vertical, solid / dashed, with an optional inline text label (left / center / right). ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.axis()`, `.dashed()`, `.titleAlign()`
- `FareFeatureRow(text, systemImage:, detail:, status:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.accent()`
- `FlightStatusBadge(status)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.time()`, `.label()`, `.showsIcon()`, `.solid()`
- `GaugeView(value:, in:, label:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.gaugeStyle()`, `.showsValue()`
- `HelperText(text)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.hasError()`, `.hidesOnError()`, `.a11yID()`
- `Icon(systemName:)` ‚Äî Icon system. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.accent()`, `.color()`

- `PriceTag(amount, currencyCode:)` ‚Äî A token-bound price label. ¬∑ modifiers: `.original()`, `.originalBelow()`, `.unit()`, `.size()`, `.emphasis()`, `.discountBadge()`, `.fractionDigits()`, `.free()`, `.soldOut()`, `.prefix()`, `.from()`, `.animatesValue()`

- `QRCode(value)` ‚Äî A token-sized (but high-contrast) QR code. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`
- `RadialProgress(value)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.lineWidth()`, `.showsLabel()`, `.status()`, `.dashboard()`, `.accent()`, `.ringColor()`, `.a11yLabel()`
- `Rating(value:)` ‚Äî Star rating with two layouts (stars / numeric-leading), continuous fractional fill (display) or half-step interaction, a tappable review count, a custom character and a disabled state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.layout()`, `.countLabel()`, `.maxValue()`, `.starSize()`, `.allowHalf()`, `.symbol()`, `.sentiment()`, `.onRate()`, `.onReviewTap()`
- `RemoteImage(url)` ‚Äî Async remote image on native `AsyncImage` (no Kingfisher dependency): URL + aspect ratio (number or "16:9" string) + shimmer placeholder + failure state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.ratio()`, `.contentMode()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.circle()`
- `RollingNumber(value)` ‚Äî Odometer / slot-machine number ‚Äî each digit column rolls vertically to its new value when `value` changes (reference `RollingText`). ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.weight()`, `.accent()`, `.color()`
- `ScoreBadge(score, large:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.large()`, `.accent()`
- `SearchBadge(text)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.colors()`, `.icon()`
- `SeatCell(seat, size:, isSelected:, isSelectable:, isRecommended:, assignedInitials: ‚Ä¶)`
- `ShareButton(title, item:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.size()`, `.accent()`
- `Skeleton(shape)` ‚Äî A standalone skeleton block of an arbitrary shape and size. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.variant()`, `.highlight()`
- `SkeletonGroup(@ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Drives every group-bound skeleton in `content` from one loading flag. ¬∑ modifiers: `.loading()`, `.skeletonOnly()`
- `Spinner` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.style()`, `.size()`, `.lineWidth()`, `.accent()`, `.color()`

## Organisms (68)

- `Accordion(//:, so:, initiallyExpanded:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference AccordionView ‚Äî a single expandable row with a @ViewBuilder body instead of type-erased AnyView models. ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.subtitle()`, `.number()`, `.indicator()`, `.titleSize()`, `.density()`, `.truncateSubtitle()`, `.divider()`
- `AccordionGroup(//:, so:, initiallyExpanded:, title:)` ‚Äî A group of accordion rows with single- or multiple-open behavior (the reference `AccordionView` tracks a `Set` of open ids). ¬∑ modifiers: `.mode()`, `.indicator()`, `.surface()`, `.dividers()`, `.collapsible()`, `.itemDisabled()`
- `AgentPriceRow(provider, action:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.logo()`, `.icon()`, `.subtitle()`, `.rating()`, `.badge()`, `.warning()`, `.price()`, `.original()`, `.cta()`, `.recommended()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`
- `AlertToast(title, handler:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference AlertView ‚Äî a solid-fill status banner (complements the light-surface InfoBanner). ¬∑ modifiers: `.message()`, `.variant()`, `.icon()`, `.loading()`, `.action()`, `.onClose()`
- `AncillaryCard(title)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.image()`, `.subtitle()`, `.price()`, `.badge()`, `.quantity()`, `.added()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`
- `BlogCard(title:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.excerpt()`, `.compact()`, `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`
- `BoardingPass(passenger:, from:, to:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.airline()`, `.flightNo()`, `.cabin()`, `.cities()`, `.times()`, `.date()`, `.details()`, `.gate()`, `.bookingRef()`, `.passengerLabel()`, `.barcode()`, `.qr()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.elevation()`
- `BrowserFrame(url:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.elevation()`, `.accent()`
- `Callout(text)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.variant()`, `.calloutStyle()`, `.showsIcon()`, `.icon()`, `.action()`, `.onClose()`
- `Card(title, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.elevation()`, `.contentPadding()`, `.extraAction()`, `.loading()`, `.surface()`
- `CardStack(items, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.maxVisible()`, `.peekOffset()`, `.rotation()`
- `Carousel(items, loop:, currentIndex:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî A generic paging carousel with dot indicators, optional autoplay and optional prev/next arrows. ¬∑ modifiers: `.autoplay()`, `.arrows()`, `.dots()`, `.fade()`
- `ChatBubble(text, author:, time:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.side()`, `.icon()`, `.accent()`
- `Counter(value:, label:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.accent()`, `.separator()`
- `Coupon(code:, label:, onCopy:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.couponStyle()`, `.size()`, `.icon()`, `.discount()`, `.expiry()`, `.fullWidth()`, `.block()`
- `DataTable(title, align:, sortKey:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.striped()`, `.pageSize()`, `.loading()`, `.onRowTap()`
- `DestinationCard(title, image:)` ‚Äî A token-bound destination / favourite card. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.subtitle()`, `.price()`, `.rating()`, `.ribbon()`, `.badge()`, `.tags()`, `.favorite()`, `.aspect()`, `.overlayTitle()`, `.onTap()`, `.elevation()`
- `Diff(@ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.aspect()`
- `EmptyState(title)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference EmptyCardView. ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.message()`, `.imageMaxHeight()`, `.iconForeground()`, `.iconBackground()`, `.iconCircleSize()`, `.primaryAction()`, `.secondaryAction()`
- `FareFamilyCard(name, price:)` ‚Äî A token-bound fare-family option card. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.currency()`, `.accent()`, `.features()`, `.selected()`, `.selection()`, `.onSelect()`
- `FareSummary(lines, currencyCode:)` ‚Äî A token-bound fare breakdown. ¬∑ modifiers: `.onInfo()`
- `FilterBar(title, id:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.onFilter()`, `.onSort()`, `.collapsible()`, `.size()`, `.chipStyle()`, `.leadingShape()`, `.accent()`, `.spacing()`
- `FilterList(title, count:, icon:, id:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.title()`, `.bordered()`, `.showsSeparators()`, `.selectAll()`, `.surface()`
- `FlightCard(airline:, from:, to:, departure:, arrival:, stops: ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî A token-bound flight card ‚Äî one segment, or a multi-leg itinerary. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.stops()`, `.price()`, `.airlineIcon()`, `.badge()`, `.onSelect()`, `.favorite()`, `.scarcity()`, `.fareBrand()`
- `FlightListItem(name, price:, perks:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.sliceLabels()`, `.flightNo()`, `.cabin()`, `.airlineIcon()`, `.price()`, `.original()`, `.fares()`, `.departures()`, `.deal()`, `.trend()`, `.badge()`, `.amenities()`, `.baggage()`, `.onDetails()`, `.selected()`, `.onSelect()`, `.expanded()`
- `FlightResultRow(airline:, from:, to:, departure:, arrival:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.flightNo()`, `.cabin()`, `.stops()`, `.returnLeg()`, `.addLeg()`, `.price()`, `.airlineIcon()`, `.airlineLogo()`, `.baggage()`, `.badge()`, `.favorite()`, `.bookmark()`, `.totalPrice()`, `.urgency()`, `.onSelect()`, `.onDetails()`
- `FlightTicketCard(from:, to:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.cities()`, `.times()`, `.duration()`, `.stops()`, `.airline()`, `.airlineLogo()`, `.price()`, `.favorite()`, `.accent()`, `.elevation()`, `.surface()`
- `FloatingActionButton(systemImage:, label:, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.shape()`, `.accent()`, `.color()`, `.badge()`
- `Footer(title, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`
- `Gallery(items, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.columns()`, `.aspect()`
- `Hero(title:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.cta()`, `.dark()`
- `HeroSurface` ‚Äî The default `Hero` surface.
- `HotelResultCard(name:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.image()`, `.images()`, `.location()`, `.score()`, `.reviewsSuffix()`, `.features()`, `.promos()`, `.price()`, `.original()`, `.discountBadge()`, `.stay()`, `.extraDiscount()`, `.badge()`, `.favorite()`, `.onSelect()`, `.accent()`, `.imageHeight()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`, `.surface()`, `.showsPageDots()`
- `ImageCollage(urls, onTap:)` ‚Äî A gallery collage of remote images with count-aware layouts (1 / 2 / 3 / 4+) and a "+N" overlay on the last visible tile. ¬∑ modifiers: `.height()`, `.spacing()`, `.cornerRadius()`
- `InfoBanner(message, title:, links:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference InfoMessage. ¬∑ modifiers: `.variant()`, `.showsIcon()`, `.icon()`, `.fullWidth()`, `.action()`, `.onDismiss()`
- `KeyValueTable(label, value:, style:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.title()`, `.bordered()`, `.surface()`
- `ListRow(total:, each:, unit:)` ‚Äî A flexible list row that consolidates the reference ListItem family (Default / Chevron / Checkbox / Radio / Menu / Quick-action) into one token-bound view. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.number()`, `.size()`, `.icon()`, `.leadingImage()`, `.leadingSelection()`, `.alertCount()`, `.badge()`, `.meta()`, `.infos()`, `.selected()`, `.multilineTitle()`, `.trailing()`, `.onInfo()`, `.textStyle()`, `.accent()`
- `ListSectionHeader` ‚Äî A non-interactive section-header row inside a list (Reference menu `.secondary`).
- `ListView(items, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Ant-style List container: optional header/footer, surface variants, row dividers (split), and a loading (skeleton) state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.header()`, `.footer()`, `.surface()`, `.bordered()`, `.loading()`, `.split()`, `.emptyText()`
- `LocationCard(title:, coordinate:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.subtitle()`, `.distance()`, `.mapHeight()`, `.spanMeters()`, `.onTap()`, `.pois()`, `.directions()`, `.onDirections()`, `.snapshot()`
- `LoyaltyCard(tier:, points:)` ‚Äî A token-bound loyalty membership card. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.memberName()`, `.unit()`, `.progress()`, `.icon()`, `.gradient()`, `.animatesValue()`, `.membership()`, `.flippable()`
- `MapCallout(title:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.image()`, `.subtitle()`, `.score()`, `.price()`, `.onSelect()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.pointer()`
- `MenuCard(title:, subtitle:, systemImage:, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.icon()`
- `NavigationBar(systemImage:, activeSystemImage:, label:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `NotificationCard(title:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.message()`, `.date()`, `.unread()`, `.variant()`, `.onClose()`, `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`
- `PageHeader(systemImage:, accessibilityLabel:, handler:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.showTitle()`, `.tags()`, `.searchSummary()`, `.searchField()`, `.logo()`, `.onBack()`, `.leading()`, `.actions()`, `.primaryButton()`, `.mapFilter()`, `.tabs()`, `.progress()`, `.stepper()`
- `PagingCarousel(items, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Custom drag-paging carousel with PEEKING neighbors + threshold snap (the reference `PagingScrollView`). ¬∑ modifiers: `.peek()`, `.spacing()`, `.autoplay()`
- `PhoneFrame(@ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.notch()`, `.bezel()`
- `PriceAlertCard(title, isOn:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.icon()`, `.price()`, `.trend()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`
- `PromoBanner(title, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.icon()`, `.ctaTitle()`, `.accent()`, `.color()`
- `RatingSummary(score:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.label()`, `.reviews()`
- `ResultView(status, title:)` ‚Äî Ant-style "Result" template: a full-page status view for the outcome of an operation (success / info / warning / error) or an exception page (404 / 403 / 500), with up to two actions. ¬∑ modifiers: `.message()`, `.subtitle()`, `.icon()`, `.content()`, `.extra()`, `.primaryAction()`, `.secondaryAction()`
- `ReviewCard(author:, score:, text:)` ‚Äî A token-bound single review card. ¬∑ modifiers: `.surface()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`, `.date()`, `.title()`, `.verified()`, `.photos()`, `.stars()`, `.expandable()`, `.onPhotoTap()`
- `RoomCard(name:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.image()`, `.board()`, `.occupancy()`, `.features()`, `.price()`, `.original()`, `.unit()`, `.discountBadge()`, `.badge()`, `.selection()`, `.onSelect()`, `.accent()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`, `.surface()`
- `SeatMap(sections:, selection:)` ‚Äî A generic, token-bound seat map. ¬∑ modifiers: `.maxSelection()`, `.seatSize()`, `.showsLabels()`, `.legend()`, `.fuselage()`, `.showsSeatInfo()`, `.recommended()`, `.currency()`, `.seatEnabled()`, `.passengers()`, `.zoomable()`, `.seatDisplay()`, `.aisleWidth()`, `.tierColors()`
- `SegmentedTabBar(title, caption:, systemImage:, trailingSystemImage:, badge:, isEnabled:)` ‚Äî Tab bar with a selection binding and an animated underline. ¬∑ modifiers: `.scrollable()`, `.tabStyle()`, `.scrollAlign()`, `.dividers()`, `.a11yID()`
- `RadioCard(title, isSelected:, action:)` ‚Äî Organisms. ¬∑ modifiers: `.description()`
- `CheckboxCard`
- `SheetHeader(title)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.onBack()`, `.onClose()`, `.progress()`, `.showsDivider()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`
- `Sidebar(tag:, label, systemImage:, badge:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.header()`, `.footer()`, `.width()`, `.a11yID()`
- `StickyBookingBar(ctaTitle, action:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.price()`, `.original()`, `.note()`, `.discountBadge()`, `.ctaIcon()`, `.enabled()`, `.accent()`, `.surface()`, `.showsShadow()`
- `ThemePicker(selection:, themes:, onSelect:)` ‚Äî A grid of `ThemePreset` preview cards. ¬∑ modifiers: `.columns()`, `.spacing()`
- `TicketStub(@ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî A token-bound ticket / boarding-pass surface. ¬∑ modifiers: `.perforation()`, `.notchRadius()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.elevation()`, `.surface()`, `.dashColor()`, `.contentPadding()`
- `Timeline(title:, time:, description:, systemImage:, state:, color:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.axis()`, `.mode()`, `.reversed()`, `.pending()`
- `Upload(id:, name:, status:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.buttonTitle()`, `.maxCount()`, `.prompt()`
- `UploadList` ‚Äî `Upload` wired to an `UploadController` ‚Äî renders its files with remove + retry.
- `VideoPlayerView(url, progress:, isMuted:, onTap:)` ‚Äî Inline video on AVKit (reference `InlineVideoPlayerView`): autoplay, loop, mute, aspect-fill, and active-gating (only the visible item plays). ¬∑ modifiers: `.autoplay()`, `.loop()`, `.muted()`, `.muteToggle()`, `.tapToToggle()`
- `WindowFrame(title, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.elevation()`, `.accent()`

## Chainable modifiers (all components)

Set styling/variants/flags AFTER the init, SwiftUI-style:
